title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code reviews AutoResearch from Andrej Karpathy as an approach to iterative self-improvement in software development. The video explores simulation and discusses use cases, positioning AutoResearch as a new lens for software improvement rather than a universal solution.
